MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-15-2012 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN TRIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). PHILIP SODERQUIST APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. EILEEN BOOTH APPEARING VIA COURTCALL FOR DEFENDANTS STANDARD CONSTRUCTION OF SAN FRANCISCO AND THOMAS SESTAK. DEFENDANTS WITHDREW THEIR OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 6/25/12 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF DEMANDED JURY TRIAL. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
